Notice Of Application And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Court Action
Off Calendar Feb-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF COLLIER OSTROM, INC. Notice of Application and Petition to Compel Arbitration and Stay Court Action. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
